content_fingerprint: openai publishes workspace agents guide for chatgpt powered workflow automation openai has released a structured guide on building deploying and scaling workspace agents inside chatgpt targeting teams that want to automate repeatable processes and connect tools across operations openai published a dedicated academy page titled workspace agents on april 22 2026 covering how developers and team leads can build agents within chatgpt that automate recurring workflows integrate external tools and coordinate tasks across an organization the content is positioned as a practical learning resource addr
